SEARCH
Package com.lattice.graph

Class MetricsSpec

java.lang.Object
com.lattice.graph.MetricsSpec
public final class MetricsSpec extends Object
Graph-level metrics controls.

Metrics are off by default. Enabling hot counters adds per-message counter updates on graph, stage, edge, wait, and routing paths.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    fusedLogicalEdgeCounters()
    Returns whether logical counters for fused/elided edges are enabled.
    MetricsSpec
    fusedLogicalEdgeCounters(boolean fusedLogicalEdgeCounters)
    Returns a copy with logical counters for fused/elided edges enabled or disabled.

    Returns whether hot-path counters are enabled.
    MetricsSpec

    Returns a copy with hot-path counters enabled or disabled.

    off()
    Creates a metrics spec with all metrics disabled.

  • Method Details

    • off

      public static MetricsSpec off()
      Creates a metrics spec with all metrics disabled.

    • hotCounters

      public MetricsSpec hotCounters(boolean hotCounters)
      Returns a copy with hot-path counters enabled or disabled.

    • residenceTiming

      public MetricsSpec residenceTiming(boolean residenceTiming)
      Returns a copy with edge residence-time tracking enabled or disabled.

    • stageHistograms

      public MetricsSpec stageHistograms(boolean stageHistograms)
      Returns a copy with stage batch/service histograms enabled or disabled.

    • fusedLogicalEdgeCounters

      public MetricsSpec fusedLogicalEdgeCounters(boolean fusedLogicalEdgeCounters)
      Returns a copy with logical counters for fused/elided edges enabled or disabled. This option is dormant unless hot counters are also enabled.

    • hotCounters

      public boolean hotCounters()
      Returns whether hot-path counters are enabled.

    • residenceTiming

      public boolean residenceTiming()
      Returns whether edge residence-time tracking is enabled.

    • stageHistograms

      public boolean stageHistograms()
      Returns whether stage histograms are enabled.

    • fusedLogicalEdgeCounters

      public boolean fusedLogicalEdgeCounters()
      Returns whether logical counters for fused/elided edges are enabled.
